stdout:
Table	Create Table
datasets	CREATE TABLE `datasets` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `uid` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `format` enum('CSV','JSON','YAML') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'JSON',
  `row_count` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `size_bytes` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `storage_url` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `dataset_type_id` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `datasets_uid_unique` (`uid`),
  KEY `idx_datasets_project` (`project_id`),
  KEY `idx_datasets_created` (`created_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
